.status-bar.background: rgba(65, 170, 170, 0.06) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(16, 43, 43) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.background: rgb(16, 43, 43) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(16, 43, 43) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(16, 43, 43) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgba(65, 170, 170, 0.06) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgba(65, 170, 170, 0.06) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgba(65, 170, 170, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(16, 43, 43) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgba(65, 170, 170, 0.06) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input.prompt-input[type=\"text\"].background: rgb(16, 43, 43) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgb(16, 43, 43) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"text\"].background: rgb(16, 43, 43) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgba(65, 170, 170, 0.4) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

td.background: rgba(65, 170, 170, 0.08) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

th.background: rgba(65, 170, 170, 0.15) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
